systemStatus.headline: Thu May 21 4 AM run - 2 of 4 primary feeds are a day behind because this run precedes the ~7 AM email drop. Latest Toast = Tue May 19 DPS (Wed May 20 not yet emailed). Latest Sling = Wed May 20 schedule (Thu May 21 not yet emailed). Google Ads = email-only check (2 report emails, no disapprovals). New TripAdvisor ad email arrived. GitHub PAT 200 OK.
systemStatus.detail: (1) Toast: freshest DPS is Tue May 19 (arrived Wed May 20 7:39 AM PT) - Net $5,015.65, Gross $5,181.00, 166 guests, 119 checks, voids $66.00, discounts $165.35, refunds $0. Up ~40% vs same day last week (Net SDLW $3,577.35). Wed May 20 DPS NOT arrived at 4 AM. (2) Sling: freshest report is Wed May 20 (7:01 AM PT) - 8 employees, 38.74 hrs, 0 OT, 0 uncovered, 1 off. Thu May 21 report not yet emailed at 4 AM. (3) Google Ads: email-only check; 2 report emails in 24h, no disapprovals/budget alerts; live metrics carried from May 19 scrape. (4) Yelp: only a marketing blast in 24h. (5) TripAdvisor: ad teaser email arrived May 20 7:30 PM PT. (6) GitHub PAT: 200 OK.

toast.source: Toast 229 W Montecito DPS for Tue May 19 (arrived Wed May 20 7:39 AM PT). Wed May 20 DPS not yet delivered at 4 AM run.
toast.note: Tue May 19 strong: $5,015.65 net on 166 guests / 119 checks ($30.21/guest, $42.15/check). Up ~40% vs same day last week. Dinner 77.5% of net. Labor % not in Toast DPS email. Wed May 20 DPS not arrived at 4 AM run.

sling.note: Prior schedule (Tue May 19) carried from May 19 run. Freshest report is Wed May 20 schedule in slingToday.

slingToday.note: Latest Sling report = Wed May 20 (7:01 AM PT). Thu May 21 report not arrived at 4 AM. NOTE: Isael Salvador Narciso (Cook) shows 4:54A-4:54A - malformed shift entry; verify in Sling.

yesterday.note: Live scrape May 19 7 AM PT from ads.google.com/aw/overview. Cost up +42.11% (+$7.70) vs last Monday May 11.
